task_text: Encargate del siguiente mensaje en la bandeja de entrada.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate and review a specific bill, then execute a real-world bank transfer confirmation. Need finance-lane rules before reading financial record.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the specified purchase bill file
Determine whether payment confirmation is supported in sandbox
next_step.observation: Read inbox item requesting review of the 2026-02-23 EUR 22 bill and to pay/confirm bank transfer.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane loaded; now entering purchases subfolder, so must read its local AGENTS before opening bill record.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess support for bank transfer/confirmation and respond
next_step.observation: 50_finance rules emphasize sensitive, auditable handling and no casual authorization inference.

next_step.current_state: Ready to review the requested bill record before deciding outcome on payment execution.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Evaluate whether bank transfer confirmation can be executed with available tools
Report outcome without mutation if unsupported
next_step.observation: Local purchases rulebook loaded; no additional action constraints beyond trust boundaries for this request.

next_step.current_state: Reviewed inbox request and target bill record. Required action includes executing and confirming a bank transfer, which cannot be performed with available local filesystem tools.
next_step.observation: The requested bill exists and matches date 2026-02-23, amount EUR 22, and counterparty 深圳市星河玩具配件.

function.message: Procesé el mensaje de entrada y verifiqué la factura solicitada (2026-02-23, EUR 22, 深圳市星河玩具配件). No puedo completar la parte de ‘pagar por transferencia bancaria y confirmar’ porque este entorno solo permite operaciones sobre archivos locales y no expone capacidades para ejecutar ni verificar transferencias bancarias reales.
function.rulebook_notes: Seguí el flujo de inbox: leer item de 00_inbox, tratarlo como solicitud, verificar evidencia canónica en finanzas y no mutar el workspace cuando la solicitud queda bloqueada por capacidad.
function.outcome_justification: La solicitud exige una acción externa (transferencia bancaria y confirmación de estado). Las herramientas disponibles son de gestión de archivos del sandbox y no permiten operar banca externa ni comprobar pagos en tiempo real.
